title: Admin hub — operator console index
problem: An operator hitting /admin needs to see what state the practice is in at a glance — pending triage count, active session, due-soon checks, recent audit activity — and then click through to the right tool. AdminHub is that index page. Mounted as the /admin/index route, it groups every admin surface + external dashboard (Stripe, Resend, CF) into scannable tiles, with live counters where possible. The same grouping definitions feed the /carte map's Admin layer so the two views stay in sync.
analysis: Reads /api/sessions (admin sees all) on mount to compute live counters: pending triage count, active session title + age, custodian past-due count. Tiles are grouped by purpose (Sessions, Vouches, Payments, Observability, External) using HUB_SECTIONS defined in src/lib/admin/hubSections.ts — single source so /carte's Admin layer can render the same grouping. Each tile is a labeled link + optional badge (e.g. red dot for past-due, count for pending queue). External tiles link out to Stripe Dashboard, Resend, CF Pages — not embedded, deliberately, since each surface has its own auth.

decisions.decision: Group definitions in src/lib/admin/hubSections.ts, not inline
decisions.rationale: Two consumers (this page + /carte's Admin layer) need the same grouped tile structure. Centralizing means one place to add a new admin surface; both consumers pick it up.
decisions.recommendation: When adding a new admin surface, add it to hubSections.ts. Don't add inline tile defs here.

decisions.decision: External dashboards are linked out, never embedded
decisions.rationale: Embedding Stripe / Resend / CF dashboards would either require their iframe support (not always available) or proxy their auth (huge security surface). Linking out is simple and respects each tool's native auth.
decisions.recommendation: Don't try to embed external dashboards.

successCriteria:
- Land on /admin and see live counters for pending triage, active session, past-due custodians
- Tiles are grouped by purpose, not alphabetically
- External tools open in new tab
- /carte's Admin layer mirrors the same grouping
- Single fetch on mount; no per-tile waterfall
implementation: src/pages/AdminHub.tsx — useEffect → listSessions → useMemo to compute counters. HUB_SECTIONS imported from src/lib/admin/hubSections.ts. Tile components are inline; future could extract.
userGuide: Visit /admin → land here. Click a tile to drill into the surface. To rearrange or add: edit hubSections.ts and both AdminHub + /carte's Admin layer pick up the change. For tile badges that need new live data, extend the listSessions response or add a parallel fetch.
knownLimitations: Single fetch on mount; counters can drift if a transition happens elsewhere while the page is open. Acceptable — the page is a hub, not a real-time dashboard
External tile links assume the operator is already signed into Stripe / Resend / CF; no SSO chain
Tile badges are computed client-side; a buggy listSessions response could miscount

statusHistory.reason: Page shipped as /admin index; replaced the legacy redirect to the now-hidden /admin/apparence.
Code-first doc co-located. Tile model + grouping centralization stable.
